parameters.text: You are an operations assistant. Write a concise manager-ready follow-up summary using only this structured meeting JSON. Do not invent owners, dates, tasks, or decisions.\n\n{{$json}}

value.risk_count: ={{ $('Extract Structured Meeting Data').first().json.counts.risks + $('Extract Structured Meeting Data').first().json.counts.blockers }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ...$('Extract Structured Meeting Data').first().json, follow_up_summary: $('AI Follow-up Summary').first().json.text || $('AI Follow-up Summary').first().json.output || '' } }}
